feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red reached the Celadon Game Corner exterior instead of jumping straight into the hideout.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red spotted a Rocket guard watching the Game Corner poster more closely than the door.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill detected the Silph Scope echo bouncing through a Coin Case signal near the Game Corner entrance.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket's public Game Corner guard has been exposed as the first Celadon hideout pressure point.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight's sleep coin ad is steering Celadon's nightlife away from the pattern Red and Bill found.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Game Corner guard battle is unlocked.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman defeated the Rocket Game Corner guard and forced Rocket's public front to slip.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red saw the guard protect the poster switch, confirming the hideout-entry lead.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Game Corner hideout-entry lead is unlocked for the next Celadon story beat.
